message:
Command `# Iter 1 at 90%, 40 min. Still computing 90-100% sections.
# Keep 5-min polls to watch for iter 1 completion and iter 2 start.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -4 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 140)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP"
  echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  tail: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LR DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -20
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

{"command": "# Iter 1 at 90%, 40 min. Still computing 90-100% sections.
# Keep 5-min polls to watch for iter 1 completion and iter 2 start.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -4 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 140)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP"
  echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  tail: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LR DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -20
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 86400}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Iter 1 at 90%, 40 min. Still computing 90-100% sections.
# Keep 5-min polls to watch for iter 1 completion and iter 2 start.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um\|0 DRC" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -4 | tr '\n' '|' | head -c 140)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP"
  echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  tail: $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LR DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -20
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out
